name: 13q31_3_miR17_92_SD
description: The MIR17HG (miR-17~92 oncogenic cluster) at 13q31.3 within the C13orf25/MIR17HG locus, flanked by small (~5-20 kb at 93-97% identity) intra-chromosomal SDs and shared paralog footprints with MIRC18 on chrX and MIR106B-25 on chr7. Genomic amplification of this cluster is common in B-cell lymphomas. Germline deletions cause Feingold syndrome 2.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-20 kb SDs at 93-97% identity flanking MIR17HG/C13orf25; paralog miRNA cluster footprints on chrX MIR106A and chr7 MIR106B.
